review_body_text: Truly a collaborative environment. Great perks, lots of on-site facilities, ie: workout room, meditation room, etc... Catered food and a very well-stocked kitchen. Up to date IT and infrastructure, great training and ramp up. Excellent managers to work with. A positive and inclusive culture.
Got to learn new technologies and learned to interact with clients.Made new friends from different diversities. Learned to be punctual as the bank needed me to be on time for work.
Can work in team, and get to exchange idea and advice from superior. Helping each other no only focusing in the same department but other department also.

Excellent benefits for staff. We were equipped with knowledge and skills. Everything was very tactical and practical with Maybank. Staff’s benefits are one of the great thing in Maybank. There are a lots of benefits and good quality with Maybank.

I love working here as i have served Maybank for the past 6 years and also my first company that i joined straight after my graduation. My post now need me to sit down with my superior at least 2 hours, meeting and brainstorming on how to boost our company profit. My job scope now is Business Development Officer for Foreign Currency Notes. My job area is to review tenancy agreement for Forex Booth and help in generating income for Forex Booth and branches. My scope includes generating new business proposal, writing new business requirement, set up event and business generating new projection proposal.
cons_text: limited medical coverage for spouse and limited coverage for dental

review_body_text: Its a typical GLC company that comprises multi layer management level. Great place to learn and with its structured environment, one with agility may face obstacles.
Being an intern there was special, guidance given, tasks clearly communicated, support provided, mistakes are pointed out professionally, constant learning and development

Role as CEO to direct, lead and monitor whole company operation towards getting better performance in terms of sales and profitability. The best school to learn about the process of a big company. All experience with Maybank are useful with new chapter in my working life.
Opportunities in meeting great people and great teams but culture aren't pleasant. Shows no mercy and look down on Junior staff. No teamwork promoted.

- Learning about financial services for example loan, insurance, saving account, etc. - The learning outlines are targeted for the roles in frontline as well as customer facing. - Can work as a part of team and exchange idea among manager and employee.

Enjoyed experience of work place working with motivated colleagues. Management and colleagues are so supportive. The hardest part of the job was having to struggle to achieve monthly target with the recycle leads produced by management. There is no work life balance if didn't not achieve target on that month. You will be lectured to hit sales from different embarrassed ways.
one of the top bank in south asia. big company that u should fight to work with them. Job opportunities less as they start doing digital banking. Learn a lot from this company

Have been working for more than 15 years, was a great experience in various section from processing loan application, marketing, reviewing and monitoring loan portfolio, system administration, customer service for internal and external, including managing business report.

as u know maybank give their employee very good benefits but their senior staff are so cocky.rotation shift are boring with less of support.no bonding like u are working alone.mostly workers can stand 2-3months

Despite we learn the new tools by our own, It making me develop myself with pure effort where I'll constantly looking for new resources available via the internet. I must say that the team had successfully delivered the project despite being the "experiment" team to use a new open source tool, Katalon, to automate the regression test.

review_title: It is an okay place to work at
review_body_text: The fun part comes from the colleagues you work with. Good compensation. Get to meet lots of different people from various places. Need to work alone most of the time.

What i have learn from there is : - take seriously on our task and try completing the task before deadline -help each other’s - pantual on attendance - Working culture fun - last thing the most im enjoyable at there is management alwyas have a plan for our department go outing
Excellent company for career growth. Can learn how to managed fraud case and create a wonderful customer experiance and makes them feels great when do any inquiry with Maybank

Maybank is a Strong learning and growing platform for juniors. Maybank has good Banking system and is a matured financial industry . The bank innovates and grows continuously. There is a vast career enhance opportunity for employees. Nevertheless the benefits offered to employees are great interms of remuneration and medical. The practice of TIGER values within the bank creates all employees to be committed and have ownership in achieving their milestones

In my previous company, I have learned to deal with a new environment as it was my first job. For example, dealing with different kind of customer's attitudes, promoting and selling the company's products as well as doing some documentation in the working place. The most enjoying part of the job is able to create a very strong bond between the employees in the office. However, the hardest part of the job is to maintain the target consistently for the company on the daily basis, which means we need to achieve our target at the end of each day.
